queries.item: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:ab__preload_links` ( `link_id` mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL auto_increment, `company_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL default 0, `url` varchar(255) NOT NULL default '', `format` varchar(32) NOT NULL default '', `use_timestamp` char(1) NOT NULL default 'Y', `status` char(1) NOT NULL default 'A', PRIMARY KEY (`link_id`), KEY `status` (`status`) ) DEFAULT CHARSET UTF8;
REPLACE INTO ?:privileges (privilege, is_default, section_id, group_id, is_view) VALUES ('ab__preload.manage_data', 'Y', 'ab__addons', 'ab__preload', 'N')
REPLACE INTO ?:privileges (privilege, is_default, section_id, group_id, is_view) VALUES ('ab__preload.view_data', 'Y', 'ab__addons', 'ab__preload', 'Y')
DELETE FROM ?:privileges WHERE section_id = 'ab__preload' OR group_id = 'ab__preload'
